LanguageData.UB_SNS_IpadKid.title: Viewpad child
LanguageData.UB_SNS_IpadKid.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was mostly ignored by their parents when they were younger, most of [PAWN_possessive] early development was learned from the Viewpad they would give [PAWN_objective] to keep [PAWN_objective] entertained and not annoy them.
